obsidian.description: Read/write Obsidian vault. Powers strategy advisor, content ideas, growth playbook reference.

figma.description: Create carousel frames, cover photos, and high-density value images using Boltcall brand tokens.

buffer.description: Schedule posts at optimal times (Tue-Thu 8-10am, 12-1pm). Manage posting queue.

pdf-tools.description: Read and analyze competitor lead magnets. Extract insights from PDFs.

notion.description: Content calendar database, idea backlog, draft storage, lead magnet library, performance tracking.

google-calendar.description: Sync content calendar, posting reminders, collaboration deadlines.

slack.description: Team content approval workflow. Share post drafts for review before publishing.

playwright.description: Scrape competitor LinkedIn profiles/posts (public data only). Extract post patterns and hook styles.
